articles.author: Doug Feinberg
articles.title: WNBA suspends Alyssa Thomas 1 game for hit to Caitlin Clark’s throat - AP News
articles.description: The WNBA has suspended Phoenix’s Alyssa Thomas for one game after she made contact with her fist to Caitlin Clark’s throat in Wednesday night’s matchup against Indiana. It happened with 6:52 left in the second quarter and was deemed to be a non-basketball act…
articles.content:
NEW YORK (AP) The WNBA has suspended Phoenixs Alyssa Thomas for one game after she made contact with her fist to Caitlin Clarks throat in Wednesday nights matchup against Indiana.
